title: Rubidium Toolkit
description: Magnesium/Rubidium Extras & Dynamic Lights Reforged Fork
body:
# Rubidium Toolkit

## WHAT IS THIS?
Rubidium Toolkit is a Magnesium/Rubidium Extras & Dynamic Lights Reforged fork, add localization key support and removed some features (Borderless Fullscreen, Entity Culling, Chunk Fade In, Configurable Cloud Height ).

## Features

- Zoom
- Entity Distance
- Dynamic Lights (Magnesium Dynamic Lights Feature)
- Display FPS (Remove in mc1.16.5-v1.0.4)
- True Darkness (Remove in mc1.16.5-v1.0.4)

## License
[Magnesium/Rubidium Extras](https://github.com/TeamDeusVult/MagnesiumExtras) -> LGPL

[Dynamic Lights Reforged](https://github.com/TeamDeusVult/DynamicLightsReforged) -> MIT
